3142570.name: Text Your Life
3142570.description:
As a fourth-year Law student with a part-time job at the Catal Café, you might as well end up going bald from stress. Fortunately, you can keep in touch with your peculiar group of friends and Daniel, your long-distance boyfriend, through your favorite messaging app (😉). They help you see the fun side of your busy life, as well as keep every hair in its place (or not).

Now you've just moved out of home and into your new apartment, and everyone knows that means... party time! Music, alcohol, laughter, kisses... Wait, what?! Kisses?! Your memories are blurry, but somehow you clearly recall the feeling of someone's lips on yours. A warm and pleasant feeling. Hold on!! Pleasant!? 😳

Who did you kiss that night? Will you be able to find out with the help of your girlfriends-turned-detective? How will that kiss affect your relationship with Daniel? And most importantly - how much does a good wig cost 😱?

Text Your Life is a mobile phone chat simulator that lets you put yourself in the shoes of our protagonist, a female university student with a group of eccentric friends and a love life that has suddenly turned somewhat... complicated.

-Play as if it were a real messaging app. Chat, receive and make calls, browse the profiles of your contacts...

-Shape the protagonist's personality with every choice you make, as well as her level of affinity with every character. Your personality and your choices will affect the course of the story.

7 different routes, and 6 unique love interests. Will you continue your relationship with Daniel, or will you catch feelings for someone else? Surely you won't end up in a love triangle with two best friends, right...?

-Only Chapters 1 and 2 are available for now, with more than 108.600 words of content and roughly 904 choices (about 8 hours and 30 minutes for playthrough). Make a choice every 20 messages at most! Already finished the available content? Play again and change your choices to experience completely different playthroughs!

-This game was originally written in Spanish, and it's been completely translated into English.

What are you waiting for? Log in, create your profile, put an inspiring quote that makes no sense as your status, and start chatting right now!

⏳Why does the game take so much time to load, especially after choosing/changing the language?

👉 On some devices, the Android version of TYL may take a few minutes to load. This happens because the game needs to restart, while also deleting any existing save games in order to prevent it from getting buggy after the language change.

We would love to give you a solution to this problem, but we have yet to find one 😞 We recommend giving the game a bit more time and wait a few more minutes, and in case the problem persists, exit the game and leave it running in the background, then return to it, since doing this has worked for some players.

🤔 Can I choose the main character’s gender/pronouns?

👉 We are sorry, but that’s not possible. TYL’s story revolves around a female protagonist, and her gender/pronouns along with some other information about her (such as, for example, her degree or the members of her family) are set from the beginning. Even so, we hope that this does not keep you from enjoying the game and having a fun time with the Supergroup 😊 Thank you for your understanding.

⏩ I’m a fast reader. Can I increase the speed of the messages?

👉 Yes! 🥳 You can do so by adjusting the "Messages speed" bar on the "Settings" screen.  Keep in mind that the messages speed plays a big role in the storytelling  (doubting when typing, deleting messages, etc). Speeding up the messages might not let you appreciate those details. 

📊 Where can I keep track of my personality stats, and my friendship/romance progress with the characters?

👉 You can do so by accessing the “Stats” screen from the game menu. There, you can:

✔️ Keep track of the changes in your friendship/romance levels with every character ❤️

✔️ See how the choices you’ve made are affecting your personality stats 😎
3142570.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
